system_config.NEXUS_HMAC_SECRET: The cryptographic secret used to sign and verify payloads between Apps Script and the Python VM, ensuring requests are authentic.
system_config.GEMINI_API_KEY: The API key required to authenticate with the Google GenAI SDK for LLM-based metadata extraction.
system_config.NEXUS_VM_URL: The public HTTPS endpoint of your Python backend VM. This tells the Apps Script frontend where to send its webhook payloads.
system_config.drive_sync_interval: The frequency (in minutes) at which the background engine checks for new or modified files in Google Drive.
system_config.gmail_sync_interval: The frequency (in minutes) at which the background engine polls the Gmail API or Pub/Sub for new email threads.
system_config.llm_model: The specific Gemini AI model version used for text processing (e.g., gemini-2.5-flash).
system_config.triage_enabled: Toggles the Two-Stage Triage extraction pipeline for Google Drive documents. When disabled, falls back to Single-Pass extraction.
system_config.log_retention_days: The number of days to keep immutable audit logs in the Artifact_History table before automatically archiving or deleting them.
system_config.auto_color_sync: When enabled, the branding engine automatically calculates Euclidean color distances to sync hex values between Drive folders and Gmail labels.
system_config.batch_threshold: The minimum number of pending artifacts required in the holding queue before triggering the Stage 2 Enforce LLM processing.
system_config.max_retries: The maximum number of exponential backoff retry attempts for Google API and Gemini API calls when rate-limited (429).

ui_elements.nav_mission_control: View system heatmaps and overall activity.
ui_elements.nav_workspace: Main grid and sankey views for analyzed artifacts.
ui_elements.nav_zero_trust: Review and approve newly discovered routing paths and entities.
ui_elements.nav_entity_management: Manage Correspondents, Purposes, and their custom AI extraction rules.
ui_elements.nav_prompt_sandbox: Test and tune AI prompts against specific artifacts in real-time.
ui_elements.nav_pipeline_orchestrator: Configure data ingestion filters, AI models, and post-processing actions.
ui_elements.nav_inbox_cleanup: Manage rules for automated email archiving and deletion.
ui_elements.nav_audit_timeline: View an immutable timeline of system events and actions.
ui_elements.nav_system_analytics: Monitor performance KPIs, cost metrics, and automation throughput.
ui_elements.nav_ai_assistant: Chat with an AI aware of your workspace and configurations.
ui_elements.toggle_retention_sweep: Enable or disable automated deletion/archiving of logs based on retention policies.
ui_elements.toggle_drive_relocator: Enable or disable the automatic moving of processed Drive files.
ui_elements.toggle_materialization: Enable or disable the conversion of transient emails into permanent PDFs.
ui_elements.toggle_google_tasks: Enable or disable the generation of Google Tasks for items requiring manual action.
ui_elements.btn_run_diagnostics: Trigger a comprehensive health check of all system components.
ui_elements.input_search_ast: Search across all artifacts using advanced query syntax.
ui_elements.btn_sankey_threads: Visualize the lineage and relationships of email threads.
ui_elements.btn_knowledge_grid: View a detailed, filterable tabular list of all artifacts.
ui_elements.input_historical_import: Enter a Gmail search query to retroactively process past emails.
ui_elements.btn_queue_import: Submit the historical search query to the background processing queue.
ui_elements.filter_category: Filter artifacts by their assigned high-level category.
ui_elements.filter_correspondent: Filter artifacts by the sender or vendor.
ui_elements.filter_purpose: Filter artifacts by their identified document purpose.
ui_elements.filter_json: Filter artifacts based on specific keys or values in their extracted metadata.
ui_elements.btn_bulk_edit: Apply changes to all currently selected artifacts simultaneously.
ui_elements.btn_workflow_hub: Open advanced actions like document materialization.
ui_elements.input_correspondent_id: The unique identifier for the vendor or sender being configured.
ui_elements.input_purpose_id: The unique identifier for the document type being configured.
ui_elements.btn_run_sandbox: Execute the prompt against the provided artifact and view results.
ui_elements.input_sandbox_artifact_id: The ID of the email or document to run the test prompt against.
ui_elements.textarea_sandbox_prompt: Draft prompt text to test data extraction instructions.
ui_elements.btn_save_pipeline_config: Save all pipeline settings to the backend configuration.
ui_elements.checkbox_post_auto_archive: When checked, emails successfully processed will be archived in Gmail.
ui_elements.checkbox_post_quarantine: When checked, items the AI is unsure about will be flagged for manual review.
ui_elements.btn_refresh_analytics: Reload all analytics KPIs and charts.
ui_elements.input_chat: Enter a question or command for the AI assistant.
ui_elements.btn_send_chat: Submit your query to the AI.
ui_elements.btn_materialize_selected: Convert the selected email threads into PDF documents in Google Drive.
